{
  "claims": [
    "Filipino Americans have played a vital role in the history of California and the country.",
    "The Delano Grape Strike led by Filipino American labor leaders is one of the most important labor movements in U.S. history.",
    "Filipino American labor leaders organized over 1,500 farm workers from the Agricultural Workers Organizing Committee in the 1965 Delano Grape Strike.",
    "Filipino Americans have also played an integral role in the fight for housing justice.",
    "The I-Hotel has become a symbol of Asian Americans’ identity, resilience and the fight for affordable housing.",
    "Filipino Americans represent roughly 20% of California’s registered nurses workforce.",
    "Community organizations are pivotal in empowering Filipino Americans through advocacy, education, outreach and beyond."
